description_long: This is a classic, freestanding wooden console table or sideboard with a rectangular top surface, three shallow drawers along the upper front, and two open lower shelves supported by four turned legs. The drawers each feature a small round knob, and the legs are elegantly shaped with subtle decorative details. The lower shelves are open on all sides, providing ample space for storage or display of items. The base of the table has a gently curved apron, adding a touch of traditional style. The entire piece is finished in a uniform, light gray color, giving it a clean and versatile appearance suitable for urban interiors or sheltered outdoor settings.
description: A light gray, classic wooden console table with three drawers and two open shelves, supported by four turned legs. It features decorative details and a gently curved base apron.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with knobs and two open shelves beneath, supported by decorative legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the table, the profile of the turned legs, and the open shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back panel and open shelves, with no drawers or knobs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the table's depth and leg profile.
